programme.title: Dolly Parton: Big Hair, Bigger Heart
programme.desc: From humble roots to icon status, Dolly Parton has built a rich legacy in music and beyond. This is her story.

programme.title: The Women That Made Elvis
programme.desc: Taking a look at the women who influenced Elvis Presley's life, from his mother, Gladys, to his true love, Priscilla.

programme.title: Willie Nelson: The Outlaw Country King
Malibooty
programme.desc: Three buddies (Brian Hooks, Sticky Fingaz, J.T. Jackson) leave their Arizona town and head to California for a wild beach party.

programme.title: Shoot the Hero
programme.desc: An engaged couple accidentally thwart a jewelry heist and become the target of hit men.

programme.title: Bodied
programme.desc: A progressive graduate student finds success and sparks outrage when his interest in battle rap as a thesis subject turns into a competitive obsession.

programme.title: TallBoyz
programme.desc: An officer attempts to disarm a bomb; someone leaks the TallBoyz' secret handshake; soldiers comfort a fallen comrade during his final moments.

programme.title: TallBoyz
programme.desc: A specialized hospital unit faces its toughest case yet; a man deals with afterlife bureaucracy; the TallBoyz learn Franco's dark past.

programme.title: TallBoyz
programme.desc: New Covid-19 measures affect all kinds of businesses.

programme.title: TallBoyz
programme.desc: Cheers to frontline workers; Tim is suspicious of eye contact; people always regret the bite that got away.

programme.title: Dating a Sugar Daddy: Vogue Williams Investigates
programme.desc: Television personality Vogue Williams travels across Europe to explore the world of sugar daddies, sugar babies and have common questions answered by those involved.

programme.title: How To Have A Better Orgasm
programme.desc: Women share how their experience of orgasms has improved thanks to better interpersonal communication, or just making time for themselves. Personal accounts reveal that, across the board, there's a turning point in learning how to have a better one.

programme.title: True Dating Stories
programme.desc: Lily agrees to go on a date with a handsome older man, but things turn sour when he gets high; Che is vacationing in Mexico and picks up a Norwegian hottie, but he gets caught by her husband and seized by the Mexican police.

programme.title: We Need to Talk About America
programme.desc: Sending a monkey into space; learning how to surf in a hurricane; why Dad brought a gun to the gender reveal party.

programme.title: We Need to Talk About America
programme.desc: Lighting yourself on fire in the name of love; talking about the latest body implants.

programme.title: We Need to Talk About America
programme.desc: Checking out some guy's private home video store; Sherry Cola tells us what happens when you get a Chipotle logo tattooed on your leg.

programme.title: We Need to Talk About America
programme.sub-title: At the Buffet, There Are No Rules
programme.desc: Learning how to lose weight while getting wasted.

programme.title: We Need to Talk About America
programme.desc: Building an avatar and getting lost in the crowd at the sweatiest music festivals; a 5-year-old calls 911.

programme.title: We Need to Talk About America
programme.desc: People risk their lives for sport; drones take over the world; Percy Rustomji puts Aida Rodruigez in the hot seat.

programme.title: Malibooty
programme.desc: Three buddies (Brian Hooks, Sticky Fingaz, J.T. Jackson) leave their Arizona town and head to California for a wild beach party.

programme.title: Eagles: The Long Road
programme.desc: Paying tribute to the life and career of Glenn Frey, one of the main band members. Revisiting the achievements of one of the best- selling and most loved American rock bands of all time.

programme.title: Stevie Nicks: Wild at Heart
programme.desc: For decades, Stevie Nicks has fronted one of the most successful bands in history, resurrecting them from the ashes; even with the trials and tribulations of being a member of Fleetwood Mac, Stevie has remained a role model.

programme.title: The Beatles: In the Life
programme.desc: The Beatles took the world by storm in the 1960s and are still the best-selling band of all time with 183 million sales worldwide.

programme.title: Killing John Lennon
programme.desc: A dramatic step-by-step breakdown behind the lead up to John Lennon's murder on Dec. 8, 1980.

programme.desc: Frank Vega (Danny Trejo) teams up with his agoraphobic buddy Bernie Pope (Danny Glover) to clean up Los Angeles' crime-infested streets.

programme.title: The Luau
programme.desc: A man who owes a large sum of cash throws a party that soon spirals out of control just to raise some money.

programme.desc: Jordan gets tested for STIs after a multiple person encounter, and Rylee wants to make sure his freckles are not something more serious.

programme.title: The Sex Clinic

programme.title: The Sex Clinic

programme.title: Student Sex Workers
programme.desc: Jasmine is a paramedic science student worried that she is about to get kicked off her course because of her work as an exotic dancer, and web-cammer; Carly Ray carried on with sex work after graduation and is now an award-winning porn star.

programme.title: Student Sex Workers
programme.desc: Ella has been bullied out of her university after her peers discovered she was an award-winning porn star, and Akonne is a sports science student and a stripper who doesn't consider himself to be a sex worker.

programme.title: My Big Boobs
programme.desc: Podcaster and body confidence advocate Jackie Adedeji meets women with big breasts to explore the growing issue living with larger breasts and the increased demand for reduction surgery.

programme.title: True Dating Stories
programme.desc: When Phelisha agrees to date a white co-worker, she's shocked to see him dressed up as 50 Cent; Cory scores with a MILF, but leaves a treasured family heirloom at her house and must retrieve it the only way he knows how -- in disguise.

programme.title: True Dating Stories
programme.desc: Steph's guy from Tinder has a dungeon-like abode; Tara recounts her date with a pop star; Ariel turns to dating to distract himself from the passing of a close friend.

programme.title: True Dating Stories
programme.desc: Laura offers to walk a man's dog and uses the opportunity to snoop through his house; Jordan goes out with a love interest but he blacks out from heavy drinking, leaving him to put the pieces back together of what happened the night before.

programme.title: Discontinued
programme.sub-title: Family Matters, DisneyQuest, Dream Phone, Ice Breakers Liquid Ice
programme.desc: Discontinued uncovers the rise and fall of things from the past. The episode focuses on four diverse topics: Family Matters, DisneyQuest, Dream Phone, and Ice Breakers Liquid Ice.

programme.title: Discontinued
programme.sub-title: Furby, Blackberry, Legends of the Hidden Temple, Galactic Starcruiser
programme.desc: Discontinued uncovers the rise, fall, and eventual discontinuation of various items from the past. We follow four diverse topics: the toy craze of the Furby to the enduring technology of the Blackberry, and the memorable 90s Nickelodeon TV hit Legends of the Hidden Temple to the short-lived Galactic Starcruiser experience at Disney World. The Discontinued Documentarians, Nostalgia Aficionados, and host- star of the Evil Dead franchise, Bruce Campbell- colorfully help tell their stories.

programme.title: Made From Scratch
programme.desc: María teaches her baby bro to make traditional Dominican dishes while they discuss growing up together and María setting out on her own.

programme.title: Made From Scratch
programme.desc: Omar and his brother Quique talk about musical inspiration and growing up first-generation Mexican American while they make their mom's famous recipe for El Super Taco.

programme.title: Made From Scratch
programme.desc: Joyce Wrice and her mother, Kazuko, create a childhood favorite as they talk about culture, visiting Japan, and always remembering to stay humble.

programme.title: Big Freedia: Queen of Bounce
programme.desc: Freedia courts controversy when a concert in Mississippi gets canceled for excessive twerking; the team prepares to debut new music from the Queen Diva's upcoming album; Tootie gives back to the community.

programme.title: Big Freedia: Queen of Bounce
programme.desc: A federal indictment rocks Freedia as she tries to expand her brand by launching Big Freedia's Soul Food; Flash seeks to connect with his long-lost family.

programme.title: Big Freedia: Queen of Bounce
programme.desc: Freedia has her day in court and faces a media circus; Flash heads to Michigan to meet his great-grandmother and learn about his past.

programme.title: Big Freedia: Queen of Bounce
programme.desc: Freedia's previously banned Mississippi performance gets rescheduled; Tootie surprises the girl she mentors with an opportunity at NOLA Fashion Week.

programme.title: Big Freedia: Queen of Bounce
programme.desc: Freedia expands her brand to the digital world when she produces a Bounce-based exercise app; Tootie channels her inner construction worker when the team builds a home for a local family.

programme.title: David Bowie: Out of This World
programme.desc: Few artists marked the 20th century like David Bowie marked it. He was an astonishing and eclectic performer whose work brought a new dimension to the music scene and queer culture. Driven, fierce and always wanting to escape conformity, he was an outsider and was considered as a man from another planet.

programme.title: Cher: Life in the Spotlight
programme.desc: Tracing Cher's life from her childhood stage fright to her rise as an iconic star in music, TV and movies.

programme.title: That White People S...
programme.desc: Comedian King Keraun Harris is on a journey to fully immerse himself in white culture; competitive dodgeball; curling; latte art; rock-a-billies.

programme.title: That White People S...
programme.desc: Keraun runs with wolves, goes on a stroll with a professional dog walker and sits down with a pet psychic.

programme.title: T-Pain's School of Business
programme.desc: T-Pain spots fake kicks with sneaker experts StockX; Thrilling mixes technology and thrifting to save the planet and people's wallets; T-Pain discovers how to make bank addressing the plastic crisis with Bionic Yarn.

programme.title: T-Pain's School of Business
programme.desc: T-Pain is on a quest to figure out the future of meat; he discovers a believable fake cheese steak; he eats a lab-grown chicken nugget; he joins the regenerative farming revolution.
